info.shortName: BNY Mellon US Large Cap Core Eq
info.longName: BNY Mellon US Large Cap Core Equity ETF

funds_data.description: Under normal circumstances, the fund generally invests in all of the stocks in the index in proportion to their weighting in the index. The index is a float-adjusted market capitalization weighted index designed to measure the performance of 500 of the largest companies listed on U.S. stock markets. It is non-diversified.
